**Checklist**

- [ ] I searched existing [Issues](https://github.com/hwdsl2/docker-whisper/issues?q=is%3Aissue), and did not find a similar enhancement request
- [ ] I read the [README](https://github.com/hwdsl2/docker-whisper/blob/main/README.md) or the relevant section
- [ ] This request is about the Whisper Docker image/config/API, not only faster-whisper itself

**Describe the enhancement request**
A clear and concise description of your enhancement request.

**Problem or use case**
What problem would this solve, or what workflow would it improve?

**Area**
- [ ] Docker image or build
- [ ] Runtime configuration or env vars
- [ ] API behavior
- [ ] Helper script or management command
- [ ] Docker Compose / self-hosted-ai-stack integration
- [ ] Documentation

**Current workaround**
Describe any workaround you are using today, if applicable.

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the enhancement request here.
